violations.text: Cream Cheese was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, establishment opened at 7 A.M. Product was being stored in a unit that can not adequately recover temperature in a timely manner. Product was moved to other refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
An allergy statement is lacking on the menu. Allergy statement to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Very little ice was left, PIC turned off ice machine to have remaining cubes melt. Ice machine must not be used until washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Breakfast Sandwiches were observed held at 52-57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC corrected sanitizer solution ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC emptied container. Proper storing procedures reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Utensils are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
Single service items were observed stored on the floor. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Guidance document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Wood is used in the construction of counter in the prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Approved materials printed. Wood to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. PIC ordered test strips at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
Adequate stoppers are lacking for the 3-bay sink. Stoppers to be purchased. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
